tasks.name: WDRA0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement the shared replay-safe effective-disable attribution seam for `world.enabled=false`.
acceptance_criteria: Replay can query a single helper or helper-adjacent seam for effective-disable attribution.
The helper returns tokenized path displays and fixed env displays only.
Code is formatted and clippy-clean.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/world-disabled-reason-attribution && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, WDRA0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/world-disabled-reason-attribution" SLICE_ID="WDRA0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run baseline: cargo test -p shell --test replay_world replay_no_world_flag_reports_world_toggle -- --exact --nocapture
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WDRA0-code"

tasks.name: WDRA0 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add or extend replay tests for precedence and redaction at the effective-disable helper seam.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover override env, workspace, global, and redaction cases.
Tests prove the workspace rule beats `SUBSTRATE_OVERRIDE_WORLD` when a workspace exists.
Tests are deterministic and temp-dir based.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/world-disabled-reason-attribution && git pull --ff-only

end_checklist: Run the targeted tests you add or touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WDRA0-test"

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run cross-platform compile parity, feature smoke, and full CI testing for the checkpoint-boundary slice.

Feature smoke is green for linux, macos, and windows.
Checkpoint evidence is recorded in the session log.
start_checklist: Verify the orchestration checkout is on the feature branch.
Read the checkpoint plan, tasks.json, and session log.
Compute the checkpoint checkout SHA from `WDRA2-integ-core`.
end_checklist: Record run ids and URLs in session_log.md.
Mark this task completed in tasks.json.
Do not begin final integration until the checkpoint is green.

tasks.name: Feature cleanup (worktrees and branches)
